alkylation reagent: incubated with 55 mM iodoacetamide in 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate to alkylate cysteine
alkylation concentration: incubated with 55 mM iodoacetamide in 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate
cleavage agent: the protein was digested with endoproteinase Arg-C
enrichment method: recombinant PTPN22 was immunoprecipitated with anti-FLAG affinity beads
instrument: using a TripleTOF 5600 hybrid mass spectrometer
labeling: peptides were identified after ultra-high pressure liquid chromatography (UPLC) coupled with tandem mass spectroscopy (LC-MS/MS)
reduction reagent: 10 mM DTT, and 2mM EDTA at 37°C overnight
reduction concentration: 10 mM DTT, and 2mM EDTA at 37°C overnight
